examples: But I - thought you would be kind to me, and protect me, as my kinsman!
Is not Boaz, with whose servant girls you have been, a kinsman of ours?
She added, "That man is our close relative; he is one of our kinsman-redeemers."
The stamps have been illustrated by artist Andrew Kinsman, who used photographs of all the players.
But when he looked at Poland some years after its freedom was won, he wondered if many of his kinsman had not chosen a kind of existential enslavement to Western materialism.
